meaning: n.耗尽枯竭,疲惫,筋疲力尽,竭尽,详尽无遗的论述
examples: Her face was grey with exhaustion.
She was in a state of nervous exhaustion.
Faced with exhaustion, they may not have the strength to challenge being turned down.
Though perhaps 150, 000 died of exhaustion or disease, some walked right across Congo and reached Congo-Brazzaville.
